title: Way to query & mutations sub-items?
excerpt:
Hi All, 
I’m wondering if there is a way to install an integration on “SubItems of …” boards (boards was created for subitems) ? 
Also, why the sub item changes is not populated in an API of custom action callback ? 
Tha…

posts.author: f2yez (Fayez Bdair)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m wondering if there is a way to install an integration on “SubItems of …” boards (boards was created for subitems) ?

Also, why the sub item changes is not populated in an API of custom action callback ?

Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @f2yez!

I’m afraid that at this time, there currently is no way to install any automations/integrations on a subitem board, since this board doesn’t exist in the UI and only on the backend.

Do you mind clarifying your second question? From your first, it sounds like you’re looking for the ability to listen for changes made to your subitem boards and have that trigger an integration recipe of some sort, is that correct?

If so, I’m afraid we currently don’t have the ability to do this, but I’m happy to submit this as feedback for our team’s consideration!

posts.author: f2yez (Fayez Bdair)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Helen exactly thats what I meant.

Thanks for your reply.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
